title: Telangana Assembly Speaker dismisses disqualification petitions against Nagender and Kadiyam Srihari; all 10 MLAs cleared

summary: CM Himanta Biswa Sarma said all medical colleges im Assam are named after their locations, except for this; it does not align with our naming pattern

title: Garuda Aerospace inks deal with Airbus Helicopters for Flexrotor drones
summary: The Flexrotor systems will be integrated into Garuda’s global fleet and offered to customers through both dry lease and wet lease operational models

summary: Opposition leaders have complained about the vacant deputy Speaker post, microphones being switched off, Opposition members being disallowed to speak, and mass suspensions, among major issues

title: LPG crisis LIVE: Commercial LPG shortage hits hotels, restaurants across India
summary: With the widening West Asia conflict disrupting energy supplies, many hotels, restaurants across the country on Tuesday claimed that they were facing hardships due to a shortage of commercial LPG cylinders

title: Kerala CM, Ministers to boycott PM Modi’s official event in Kochi over ‘exclusion’ of PWD Minister
summary: The event comes at a time when all political parties are busy finalising the list of candidates and strategies for the upcoming Assembly elections.

title: Arcelor Mittal, Nippon Steel invite EoI for steel fabrication unit in Andhra Pradesh
summary: The company stated in the notification inviting EoI that the execution timeline for the steel fabrication unit will be up to four years
